title: 7 curl Commands for Faster API Debugging
summary: Speed up API debugging and request testing with copy-paste curl commands for health checks, query strings, JSON requests, uploads, downloads, and retries.
verification_setup: Replace the example URLs, bearer token, and file path placeholders before running the commands.
Run download examples from a writable directory.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/curl_commands_for_faster_api_debugging.sh with real endpoints and placeholders replaced.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example URLs, tokens, and file paths with real values before running.
